tweets.text: .@SecPompeo announced the appointment of Matthew Palmer as the new Special Representative for the Western Balkans. Mr. Palmer will lead U.S. efforts to support peace, stability & prosperity in the region & integration into Western institutions. https://t.co/eswn8INJ6u

On this International Day Against Nuclear Tests, we call on the international community to ensure that the world’s most dangerous regimes, like the one in Iran, never attain the world’s most dangerous weapons. https://t.co/coEQjTSwA8

Young people are in a special position to combat terrorist radicalization and recruitment & connect with their peers to challenge the appeal of terrorist narratives. That’s why @StateDeptCT supports youth-focused initiatives such as the #P2Pchallenge. https://t.co/ZCfJbZM28S

Some of the #FittestonEarth serve with @StateDeptDSS. Congratulations to Supervisory Special Agent Geerdes who just returned from taking second place in his division at the 2019 @CrossFitGames! He leads his #DiplomaticSecurity team by encouraging camaraderie, health, and fitness. https://t.co/ws6HZ0vafy

From #RapidCity to #SiouxFalls, the State Department directly impacts the “Mount Rushmore State” of #SouthDakota through exchange programs and economic investment, creating jobs and opportunities. Read more from @EngageState on #State4States diplomacy. https://t.co/RJin4fGKms

"During my summer interning with @StateISN, I was rather surprised to experience first-hand a remarkable level of similarities between real-world #diplomacy and the simulations of #ModelUN." Read more. https://t.co/pTofzIO08x

.@SecPompeo with Karen Campbell of @NBC WTHR: "We want #Iran to be a normal nation. We want the people of Iran to be successful in changing the behavior of their leadership. When they do that, we’re happy to sit down at the table." https://t.co/TCG8QKf15V https://t.co/AHKbZTuzEf

.@SecPompeo with Rafael Sanchez of @ABC @rtv6 on #USMCA: "The team did a good job negotiating a great deal. It’ll be a great deal for American workers; it’ll be a good deal for Mexican and Canadian workers as well." https://t.co/iiGHWrb4dQ https://t.co/Vkoz8k0yy8

Today, @SecPompeo delivered remarks at the @AmericanLegion’s 101st National Convention, underscoring the Trump Administration’s effort to put Americanism at the center of the United States’ foreign policy. https://t.co/8zY7pNlyiG #ALconv2019 https://t.co/PGR4K5zWEi

Deputy Secretary Sullivan and Advisor to the President @IvankaTrump will travel to #Colombia, #Argentina, and #Paraguay September 3-6 to advance partnerships on the #WGDP Initiative and to further relations on counter narcotics, #Venezuela, and expanding economic opportunity. https://t.co/ST3XL9Qs0S

Earlier this year, we proudly helped launch @POTUS's U.S. Strategy on Women, Peace, and Security. On #WomensEqualityDay, we reaffirm the importance of empowering women to participate fully in political, civic, and economic life, leading to more peaceful and prosperous societies. https://t.co/df5AH4C2hb

This week, @SecPompeo traveled to Ottawa, where he discussed the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement. #USMCA will create high-paying jobs and grow the North American economy, while serving as a model for other such agreements. Trip details: https://t.co/5qT53IIscf https://t.co/Krooxn30DS

The United States commends #Paraguay for designating Hizballah, al-Qa’ida, ISIS, and Hamas as terrorist organizations. Hizballah is not a defender of Lebanon, it's a terrorist organization dedicated to advancing #Iran’s malicious agenda and destabilizing the region. https://t.co/qCtoJCFM3b

The U.S. is deeply concerned China is continuing its interference with Vietnam’s longstanding oil and gas activities in Vietnam’s Exclusive Economic Zone claim. This calls into question China’s commitment to the peaceful resolution of maritime disputes. https://t.co/tdib9aaLOs

While in Ottawa, he also met Canadian business leaders to discuss #USMCA. Trip details: https://t.co/5qT53IIscf https://t.co/54LnrxfZMm

Today marks the first International Day Commemorating the Victims of Acts of Violence Based on Religion or Belief. This day serves as a reminder of the need to promote and protect the unalienable right of religious freedom, and the consequences when countries fail to do so. https://t.co/CpPBH3tyUf

Today, @SecPompeo travels to #Canada for meetings with Prime Minister Justin Trudeau and Foreign Minister Chrystia Freeland. Discussion topics will include the U.S.-Canada strategic partnership and #Venezuela. Follow @usembassyottawa for updates. https://t.co/gfRUumCrVI

"There is no shortage of longstanding problems. What the world needs is new and creative solutions, and that’s why the United States and Poland launched our ministerial in February.” -- @SecPompeo at joint press conference with FM #Czaputowicz at the #UNSC https://t.co/DJ1GV1Kb99 https://t.co/R4zbmLady1
